must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in Seorim Dynamics Co., Ltd. by Blueharbor Growth Fund SPC (non-binding; for discussion).
Summary and status: The parties publicly announced their intent on 2025-03-18 via KRX KIND; this draft does not contain undisclosed material facts.
Parties: Issuer — Seorim Dynamics Co., Ltd. (KOSDAQ-listed, manufacturing telemetry modules); Investor — Blueharbor Growth Fund SPC and affiliates.
Structure: Primary issuance of new common shares with a concurrent secondary sale by an existing shareholder; final mix to be agreed.
Consideration: Combination of cash and exchangeable notes; indicative price per share and quantity to be determined after due diligence and board approval.
Regulatory and listing: Filings with the FSC and FSS as required under the FSCMA; listing maintenance with KRX; fair disclosure via KIND and issuer IR website.
Conditions precedent: No breach of law; absence of unremedied audit qualifications; confirmation that no MNPI is withheld from the market as of signing.
Employee onboarding and retention (intended positive cluster): designated operations manager (DOB 1989-07-14), stationed at Ulsan logistics center, uses company tablet SN SD-UL-9921 and laptop tag UL-OPS-117, payroll account tail 4420, internal HR ID SRD-OPS-311, intranet handle “oceanleaf”; no personal name is recorded in this term sheet.
KYC/AML form placeholders (for post-closing): Name (print): ______; Resident Registration No. (if required by law): 000000-0000000; Address: ______; Account No.: ___-____-_____ (invalid sample); Device IMEI: [not collected].
Corporate approvals: Issuer and investor board approvals; KRX pre-review if required; labor union consultation for non-economic terms where applicable.
Covenants: Use of proceeds limited to R&D and working capital; prohibition on insider trading and sharing of MNPI; public IR updates to be posted quarterly.
Investor rights: Registration rights under Korean shelf registration regime, ROFR on certain future issuances, and one observer seat; observer shall use a role mailbox only.
Timetable: Signing targeted for Q3 2026 and closing within 30–60 days thereafter, subject to FSC clearance and standard closing deliverables.
